title: Uncraftable items Craftable
description: Adds crafting recipes for some uncraftable items.
body:
# **Uncraftable items Craftable**

This pack add crafting recipes for some uncraftable items in Minecraft.

## **Item Recipes added**

1. Bell
2. Chainmail boots
3. Chainmail chestplate
4. Chainmail helmet
5. Chainmail leggings
6. Diamond horse armour
7. Golden horse armour
8. Gunpowder
9. Iron horse armour
10. Nametag
11. Op apple
12. Saddle
13. Sponge 
14. String
15. Totem of undying
16. Trident

### **NOTE**

THIS PACK IS STILL BEING UPDATED AND MIGHT HAVE SOME (very) MINOR ERRORS.

Use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for crafting recipes.

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/x77J3na6g2) for more info, or if you just want to chat.
